query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: Soft overlapping fields of color blend across the frame, with zones of magenta, pink, peach, pale blue, teal, and green merging through hazy transitions. No discernible objects, figures, or spatial depth are present; the image consists entirely of diffused chromatic gradients without identifiable subject matter.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely soft-focus abstract image with deliberate blur and dissolved detail, where zones of magenta, pink, peach, pale blue, teal, and green merge through hazy, indistinct transitions. No recognizable subject matter emerges from the chromatic haze, functioning as a non-representational study of color and texture through intentional defocus and near-total loss of structural information.
